flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Saint Johns University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.8k → $55.8k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Saint Johns University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($49.8k → $55.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Saint Johns University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Saint Johns University are 29% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($76.8k vs $59.6k).
